productDisplayName: Nike Men Olive Green Liteforce Shoes
description: Style NoteCombining the style and flair of canvas shoes with the durability and comfort of running shoes, the nike Liteforce puts the groove back in your style.Product DetailsCanvas upper with synthetic leather overlaysNike swoosh overlay near the mid-foot region for added shoe structurePadded collar with a mesh liningFoot-bed with fabric lining for breathable comfortLacing system for a snug FitPhylon mid-sole with PU foxingHerringbone grooves on the out-sole for added traction and absolute gripMaterial and CareCanvas with synthetic overlaysMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
